relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Paul writes from Divine will to holy and trusting ones in Messiah.
Grace and peace open the cosmic blessing.
Every spiritual blessing is already poured out in Messiah.
Before world-foundation, the Divine chose us in love for holiness and wholeness.
Adoption was marked beforehand through Jesus Messiah into the Divine heart.
Grace becomes glory-praise in the Beloved.
In him release comes through blood, forgiveness flowing from rich grace.
Grace abounds as wisdom and insight.
The mystery of the Divine will is made known in Messiah.
All things in heaven and earth are gathered and summed in Messiah.
Inheritance unfolds inside the purpose working all things.
Those hoping beforehand become praise of glory.
Hearing truth and trusting, they are sealed with promised holy Spirit.
Spirit is pledge of inheritance until full release.
Trust in Jesus and love for the holy ones become Paul’s thanksgiving.
Prayer remembers them without ceasing.
The Father of glory gives Spirit of wisdom and unveiling.
The eyes of the heart are illuminated to know calling, inheritance, and hope.
Surpassing power works into those who trust.
That power raised Messiah and seated him in the heavenlies.
Messiah is above every power and name in this age and the coming one.
All things are under his feet, and he is given as head to the assembly.
The assembly is his body, fullness of the One filling all in all.

contemplative_note: Ephesians 1 opens as a cosmic blessing-field: chosen in love, sealed by Spirit, gathered in Messiah, illuminated in the heart, and filled by the One filling all in all.
